incidents.sop_step: Photograph the completed assembly from three angles and attach to the production record.
incidents.severity_reason: The missing photographs could lead to quality verification challenges but do not immediately compromise safety or functionality.
incidents.incident_summary: The worker skipped the SOP step of photographing the completed assembly from three specified angles before signing off and moving the unit to the dispatch area. This omission could hinder traceability and quality assurance processes.
incidents.recommended_action: Notify the supervisor to review the incident and ensure the worker is retrained on the importance of this SOP step.
